purpose.mission: Protect PulseWorld from collapse, sabotage, fraud, or systemic failure.
purpose.context: Ensures security of ledgers, doctrines, and archives; mandates redundancy; defines crisis response protocols.

principles: Resilience First: Every failure must be survivable.
Defense in Depth: Multiple layers of protection—technical, legal, cultural.
Redundancy as Law: No single point of failure permitted.
Transparency in Crisis: All incidents logged and reviewed.
Fail-Forward Recovery: Every crisis becomes a lesson that strengthens the system.

scope.ledger_security: Treasury, Senate, Judiciary, and Executive logs cryptographically signed, replicated, monitored.
scope.archive_defense: Knowledge & Memory archives shielded from tampering, replicated across nodes.
scope.infrastructure_redundancy: At least three independent nodes host canon and ledgers at all times.
scope.fallback_systems: Cold storage, offline archives, sovereign custody nodes ensure continuity.

fraud: Immediate freeze of affected Treasury accounts
Inspector General investigation logged in Shared Archive
catastrophic_failure: Immortality Doctrine triggers restoration from backups
Knowledge & Memory Doctrine ensures archives are re-taught
Continuity Covenant guarantees re-ritualization of canon

enforcement.executive: Activates defense powers, coordinates crisis response
enforcement.judiciary: Reviews legality of defense actions, issues injunctions
enforcement.inspector_general: Audits incidents, investigates fraud, reports findings
enforcement.senate: Appropriates funds for resilience measures and approves reforms

safeguards.tamper_detection: All ledgers and doctrines cryptographically signed and monitored
safeguards.redundancy_mandate: Minimum of three live nodes + one cold archive
safeguards.dual_authorization: Defense activation requires Executive + Judiciary approval (except immediate emergencies)
safeguards.audit_trail: Every defense action logged in append-only records
safeguards.renewal_cycle: Defense protocols reviewed and updated every 2 years

accountability_metrics.resilience_drills: Quarterly simulations of fraud, attack, failure scenarios

status.version_notes: Initial enactment completing the Survival Branch of the canon.
